title: Stacksmith Stack Definition
description: Defines a single infrastructure stack for stacksmith.

name.description: Unique stack identifier within the monorepo.

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering, CI targeting, and documentation. e.g. [platform, prod]

depends_on.description: List of stack names this stack depends on. All outputs from dependencies are passed as inputs.

mock_outputs.description: Mock output values for this stack. Used by dependent stacks during plan/validate when this stack has not been applied.

type.description: Abstract component type that maps to a module in the tool configuration.

tags.description: Optional tags used for tag-expression targeting.

properties.description: Properties passed as inputs to the module. Values may contain Jinja2 expressions and Terraform references to other component module outputs.

components.description: Component definitions. Keys are component names, values specify type and properties.

use.description: Name of an operation approved in the tool configuration.

with.description: Declared operation inputs. Values may contain Jinja2 expressions and Terraform references to component module outputs.

rerun_token.description: Optional value that deliberately creates a new operation execution identity.

depends_on.description: Stack-local operations that must succeed before this operation runs.

operations.description: Native operational actions requested by this stack.
